title: Container Report - Week 29
summary:
Main
Container freight rates from China to the US have dropped over past weeks, returning to pre-tariff levels. FBX01 (China/East Asia - USA West Coast) ended the week at $2,328/FEU, down $18/FEU from last Friday but down $3,541 from this time last month. FBX03 (China/East Asia - USA East Coast) is today at $4,224/FEU down $656 compared with last Friday and down $2,961 from this time last month.
